CustomField.description: Works with Installment Period to define how often installment Opportunities are created. For example, an Installment Period of Monthly with a Frequency of 3 creates Opportunities every 3 months. Defaults to 1 if not specified.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: How many installment periods between each donation. For example, a frequency of 3 with a Monthly period means "every 3 months." Leave at 1 for standard schedules.
CustomField.label: Installment Frequency
